name: NextGen Lead Generation & Qualification Engine
description: Enterprise-grade lead qualification workflow with validation, enrichment, duplicate detection, and advanced scoring

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { status: 'error', message: 'Lead validation failed', errors: $json.validation.errors, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }, statusCode: 400 };

return { json: { status: 'success', message: 'Lead processed successfully', leadId: $json.leadId, tier: $json.qualification.tier, score: $json.scoring.totalScore, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }, statusCode: 200 };

meta.name: NextGen Lead Generation & Qualification Engine
meta.description: Enterprise-grade lead qualification with advanced scoring, validation, and enrichment
